NEWSSUB: Clarification sought from Torrent Power Ltd
HEADLINE:
The Exchange has sought clarification from Torrent Power Ltd on January 09, 2026, with reference to news appeared in https://energy.economictimes.indiatimes.com dated January 09, 2026 quoting "Torrent Power bets Rs. 1 lakh crore on energy, builds new B2C platforms: Jinal Mehta, vice-chairman and MD"

The reply is awaited.
